rootCause: After the chip contrast fixes in PRs #3816 and #3823 switched process containers to the inverted light-green surface, ProgressBar.svelte still used the same light-green fill color as non-inverted contexts. That made the completed segment visually blend into the process card background and appear missing.
resolution: Added an inverted-aware ProgressBar style path and passed the process chip inversion state into ProgressBar so inverted process cards render a dark fill with clear contrast against the light background while preserving existing behavior elsewhere.
